creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for the notification. We are aware about the problem. Currently there is no easy fix to this problem as this is built inside the tex infrastructure(bsd.tex.mk) itself and requires entire changes in the architecture of the build process. We have a plan to work on refactorizing the bsd.tex.mk but there is no specific plan/schedule on this atm as it requires lots of testing.
